tools.name: budgets.getBudgetById
tools.description: Returns a single budget with all related entities.  This resource is effectively a full budget export.

tools.name: budgets.getBudgets
tools.description: Returns budgets list with summary information

tools.name: categories.getCategories
tools.description: Returns all categories grouped by category group.  Amounts (budgeted, activity, balance, etc.) are specific to the current budget month (UTC).

tools.name: categories.getCategoryById
tools.description: Returns a single category.  Amounts (budgeted, activity, balance, etc.) are specific to the current budget month (UTC).

tools.name: categories.getMonthCategoryById
tools.description: Returns a single category for a specific budget month.  Amounts (budgeted, activity, balance, etc.) are specific to the current budget month (UTC).

tools.name: categories.updateMonthCategory
tools.description: Update a category for a specific month.  Only `budgeted` amount can be updated.

tools.name: deprecated.bulkCreateTransactions
tools.description: Creates multiple transactions.  Although this endpoint is still supported, it is recommended to use 'POST /budgets/{budget_id}/transactions' to create multiple transactions.

tools.name: payeeLocations.getPayeeLocationsByPayee
tools.description: Returns all payee locations for a specified payee

tools.name: transactions.createTransaction
tools.description: Creates a single transaction or multiple transactions.  If you provide a body containing a `transaction` object, a single transaction will be created and if you provide a body containing a `transactions` array, multiple transactions will be created.  Scheduled transactions cannot be created on this endpoint.

tools.name: transactions.getTransactionsByAccount
tools.description: Returns all transactions for a specified account

tools.name: transactions.getTransactionsByCategory
tools.description: Returns all transactions for a specified category

tools.name: transactions.getTransactionsByPayee
tools.description: Returns all transactions for a specified payee

tools.name: transactions.importTransactions
tools.description: Imports available transactions on all linked accounts for the given budget.  Linked accounts allow transactions to be imported directly from a specified financial institution and this endpoint initiates that import.  Sending a request to this endpoint is the equivalent of clicking "Import" on each account in the web application or tapping the "New Transactions" banner in the mobile applications.  The response for this endpoint contains the transaction ids that have been imported.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
